notable_phrases: game-changing updates across our platforms, including Apple Intelligence
we are very excited about Apple Intelligence and what it brings
we continue to be confident in the long-term opportunity in China
summary: Apple reported better-than-expected Q3 results with record services revenue and emphasized Apple Intelligence as a compelling upgrade catalyst, while addressing China headwinds and margin pressures with measured optimism.
change_summary: vs 2024 Q2: Analyst pushback level decreased by 14.00.
